title: Alpinestars SMX-6R

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Alpinestars SMX-6R utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system engineered to provide progressive energy absorption upon impact, significantly reducing the risk of head trauma. The outer shell is constructed from a high-strength carbon fiber composite that offers superior stiffness-to-weight ratios compared to traditional fiberglass, ensuring optimal structural integrity while minimizing rotational forces during an accident. Integrated with the MIPS (Multi-directional Impact Protection System) technology, the helmet features a low-friction slip plane that allows the inner liner to rotate independently of the head upon oblique impacts, mitigating rotational acceleration forces that often cause concussions.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of track-ready performance with the Alpinestars SMX-6R, a full-face racing helmet designed for serious competitors who demand uncompromising safety and aerodynamic efficiency. Featuring an aggressive carbon fiber shell and advanced ventilation channels, this helmet keeps you cool and focused while delivering ECE 22.06 and SNELL M-2020 certifications that set the industry standard for protection.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Alpinestars SMX-6R full-face racing helmet. Features carbon fiber shell, MIPS technology, and superior ventilation for track performance. ECE & SNELL certified.
